programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A worried Taarak asks Tapu and Goli to break Anjalis mobile phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Goli get caught by Anjali. Later, Anjali offers various delicacies to Taarak.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: A woman strives to balance her family responsibilities and emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Everything goes according to Bulbul Pandeys plans when the media attacks Karishma.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: DSP Anubhav discusses a critical situation with Haseena and Karishma.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha succeed in convincing Jethalal to raise their salaries.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goddess Lakshmi comes to Jethalal in a dream and tells him to preserve his wealth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak apologises to Anjali. Then, Anjali tells him that he is free to do as he pleases.
